bio: Creative and data-driven digital marketing strategist with a passion for building impactful brand stories and driving growth through multi-channel campaigns. Experienced in analytics, content strategy, and performance marketing.
name: SOFIA  MARTINEZ
title: Digital Marketing Strategist & Growth Specialist

projects.title: E-commerce Growth Campaign
projects.description: Scaled an online retail brand’s revenue by 120% through targeted ad campaigns and optimized landing page funnels.

projects.title: Organic Traffic Booster
projects.description: Developed and executed an SEO strategy that increased organic traffic by 200% within 6 months.

projects.title: Customer Retention Program
projects.description: Designed automated email campaigns that improved customer retention rates by 35%.

community.description: Mentored small business owners on digital marketing strategies and brand growth.
Delivered workshops on social media marketing and analytics for aspiring entrepreneurs.

education.description: Focused on data-driven marketing, consumer behavior, and predictive analytics.
achievements: Capstone project on predictive customer segmentation
Teaching Assistant for Marketing Data Science

education.description: Comprehensive foundation in marketing principles, branding, and communications.

highlights: Led multi-channel campaigns generating over $2M in annual revenue.
Improved conversion rates by 40% through A/B testing and funnel optimization.
Managed a team of 5 marketing specialists.
experience.description: Driving growth strategies and overseeing execution of digital campaigns for diverse clients.

highlights: Analyzed campaign performance and provided actionable insights.
Built dashboards to track KPIs across multiple platforms.
Optimized ad spend allocation for better ROI.
experience.description: Focused on interpreting marketing data to improve campaign effectiveness and strategy.

highlights: Grew social media following by 150% in one year.
Created viral content campaigns reaching over 1M views.
Collaborated with influencers to expand brand reach.

sloganHeroSection: Turning insights into impact and clicks into customers.
